jobs.title: Uganda Field Operations Regional Lead- Central Region

metadata.name: Expected Manager (you can leave this blank)
Referral Cheat Sheet
metadata.value:
Here is what to consider when thinking about who to refer:
"FP&A (Financial Planning & Analysis): You aren’t just recording what happened; you’re predicting what will happen. This involves variance analysis—explaining why the actual spend didn't match the budget.

Grant Lifecycle Management: This is the ""Grants Finance"" side. You’ll be tracking money from specific donor to ensure every shilling is spent according to their specific rules.

Compliance & Audit Prep: Ensuring the Uganda program stays ""audit-ready"" by maintaining strict documentation for those specific grants.

Stakeholder Liaison: You’ll be the translator between the ""numbers people"" and the ""program people,"" helping project managers understand their budgets."

metadata.name: Expected Manager (you can leave this blank)
Referral Cheat Sheet
metadata.value:
Here is what to consider when thinking about who to refer:
Commercial & Strategic Acumen: Demonstrated ability to develop commercial strategies and identify significant revenue generation as well as impact opportunities in the agricultural sector for both farmers and the organization

Innovation Pipeline Management: Proven capability in prioritizing, designing, and scaling commercial pilots in a logical and evidence-based sequence.

Financial & Risk Modeling: Strong proficiency in financial modeling and budget management.

Supply Chain & Logistical Execution: Proven capability in overseeing partner negotiations, aggregation logistics, quality control, last mile distribution and ensuring products meet buyer standards or export regulations.

Project & Performance Management: Track record of setting and reviewing KPIs, managing complex multi-workstream programs, and driving accountability for results.

Partnership Management: Demonstrated success in identifying, developing, and managing commercial partnerships with buyers, processors, and distributors.

Stakeholder Influence: Ability to represent the department at senior levels and secure buy-in from cross-functional teams including Field Execution and Government Relations.

People Leadership: Experience coaching senior staff and building a results-oriented, collaborative team culture.

metadata.value:
Here is what to consider when thinking about who to refer:
3+ years of experience in Monitoring, Evaluation, and Learning (MEL), data analysis, or program evaluation.
Experience managing medium to high complexity projects with increasing independence.
Experience managing small to medium teams and overseeing junior staff, with skills in performance evaluations and capacity building.

Competence in designing study plans, questionnaires, and implementing surveys, including calculating sample sizes and data analysis.
The ability to produce high-quality reports and manage project dashboards.
Experience in budget tracking, expenditure reporting, and asset management.
Represent the department in meetings and contribute to discussions on relevant platforms."
